Type.description: Address type. ip: IPv4; ipv6: IPv6; domain: domain name; port: port

description: Internet boundary firewall access control policy

Action.description: Action of the access control policy. accept: allow; deny: block; monitor: observe.

DestPort.description: Destination port. Format is a single port or port range. If protocol type is ICMP/ALL, value is empty; if DestPortType is group, use port address book UUID list; if DestPortType is port, use port range.

DestPortType.description: Destination port type. port: port; group: port address book.

Destination.description: Destination address of the access control policy. When DestinationType is net, use CIDR; when group, use address book UUID list; when location, use region code; when domain, use domain name.

DestinationType.description: Destination address type. net: destination subnet (CIDR); group: destination address book; location: destination region; domain: destination domain name

Direction.description: Direction of the access control policy, indicating the direction of traffic transmission. in: inbound direction; out: outbound direction.

EffectStatus.description: Access control policy status. 1: Inactive; 2: Deploying; 3: Active

EndTime.description: Policy expiration date, Unix timestamp. If RepeatType is Permanent (always active), this field is not required. If RepeatType is Once (active for a single period) or Daily, Weekly, Monthly (repeatedly active), this field must be filled in.

IpType.description: IP version. v4: IPv4; v6: IPv6

IsEffected.description: Whether the access control policy is active. true: active; false: inactive.

Prio.description: Policy priority. The lower the value, the higher the priority. 0: lowest priority; 1: highest priority; other values: other priorities. Default value is 0 (lowest priority). When modifying, this parameter represents the policy's position in the policy list (cannot be set to 0).

Proto.description: Protocol type. ICMP, TCP, UDP, ANY (any protocol). When DestinationType is domain, protocol type must be TCP.

RepeatDays.description: Recurring effective period. Required when RepeatType is Weekly or Monthly. Weekly value range: [0,6]; Monthly value range: [1,31]

RepeatEndTime.description: Repeat expiration time. Accurate to the minute, format is hh:mm.

RepeatStartTime.description: Repeat start time. Accurate to the minute, format is hh:mm. Required when RepeatType is Daily, Weekly, or Monthly (repeatedly active).

RepeatType.description: Repeat type. Permanent: always active; Once: active once; Daily: repeats daily; Weekly: repeats weekly; Monthly: repeats monthly.

RuleId.description: Unique ID of the access control policy, used to uniquely identify an access control policy.

Source.description: Source address. When SourceType is net, use CIDR; when group, use address book UUID list; when location, use region code.

SourceType.description: Source address type. net: subnet (CIDR); group: address book; location: region

StartTime.description: Policy effective start date, Unix timestamp. Not required when RepeatType is Permanent (always effective). Required when RepeatType is Once (single period effective) or Daily, Weekly, Monthly (recurring effective)

Status.description: Policy enable status. true: Enabled; false: Disabled

UpdateTime.description: Last update time of the access control policy, Unix timestamp.
